raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "I just found out that two of my closest friends have been sharing personal things I confided in them, and they organized a weekend getaway without inviting me. They later posted photos from the trip on social media, making it clear I was excluded. I’ve been working as a graphic designer, but my focus has been pulled away by the emotional fallout from this betrayal.",
  "mental_state": "I’m feeling a mix of hurt, anger, and uncertainty about whether I can trust people I’ve known for years.",
  "mood": "hurt and uncertain",
  "emotions": ["hurt", "betrayed", "angry"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["conflicts_with_friends", "social_anxiety"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The discovery of betrayal and the public exclusion on social media have made the conflict with friends feel immediate and painful, prompting me to seek support today."
}

parsed.current_life_events: I just found out that two of my closest friends have been sharing personal things I confided in them, and they organized a weekend getaway without inviting me. They later posted photos from the trip on social media, making it clear I was excluded. I’ve been working as a graphic designer, but my focus has been pulled away by the emotional fallout from this betrayal.
